Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests. Also, "V.I.P." interviews Lucy Brains and "Carol & Sis" finds Chris' interview complicated.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Harvey Korman guests. Features a number about glory & crisis of mid-life. On "Carol & Sis", Carol goes gaga.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Stiller & Meara star, showing off their act and joining in the sketch fun. Also: Carol as "Mary Worthless."
Video.title: Stiller and Meara

Video.summary: Guests Chita Rivera and Vince Edwards help spoof "distinguished women's movies" in "To Each Her Own Tears."
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Vince Edwards

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a psychiatrist trying to unlock the secret of Carol's crying, and Carol as Stella Toddler.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Paul Sand plays a shy man trying to gain confidence by listening to a self-help record.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Lucy and Carol play rival Rent-A-Car agents vying for Tim's business.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Video.summary: Mel Torme and Martha Raye guest. Featuring Martha and Carol as dog-lovers, and spoofs of Disney classics.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: Valerie Harper & Tim Conway guest! Valerie joins Carol on a date, and Tim is the world's oldest fireman.
Video.title: Valerie Harper, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest William Conrad appears in "The Family" sketch. Also: Harvey's news for his wife gives her twitches.
Video.title: William Conrad

Video.summary: Harvey and Tim are tipsy friends coming home from a night of carousing, plus a spoof of The Arabian Nights.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Includes mother Carol offering daughter Vicki some advice on the way to the altar, and Tim as a handyman.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Alice Portnoy is back to wreak more havoc, featuring guest Ronnie Schell and a "Carol & Sis" saga sketch.
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Ronnie Schell

Video.summary: Guests Art Carney and Nanette Fabray appear in "Guess What's Coming To Dinner?" and "Passion On 10th Avenue."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Art Carney

Video.summary: Guests Tom Conway and Ken Berry visit Canoga Falls in "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a tribute to Vaudeville.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Eunice gets her big break on "The Gong Show!" Also: An interview with the wife of a kidnap victim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Totie Fields take part in Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray and Michele Lee guest star, featuring a commercial take-off and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Michele Lee

Video.summary: Kitchen commercials highlight this episode, and Tim returns as the steelworker looking to do away with Carol.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters joins for a sketch about bratty kids. The Early Early Show presents "The Most Happy Stella."
Video.title: Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Tonight's guest: Mr. Steve Lawrence!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns as a guest! Sketches include Harvey as a hammy actor, and Jim as an emergency room patient.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tonight, Tim and Carol spar over a late-night phone call.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests! Jim plays a chaperone. Carol and Harvey are majestic in a King Henry VIII sketch.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Ross Martin and John Davidson guest! John shows off his pipes, and Harvey is interrupted by an extortionist.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: The season finale features the regular cast, highlighting Carol's performance as the girlfriend of a producer.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife plagued by her husband's gambling. Meanwhile, a touring star takes the stage.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Mickey Rooney star in a meeting between First Ladies, an audition, and the spoof "Kids Town."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: When Mama and The Family play Charades, things turn to chaos. Also: a despondent bar patron meets her match.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Bing Crosby & Paul Lynde appear in "As The Stomach Turns." On "The Old Folks", Lynde joins the elderly duo.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Guest star Tim Conway steals the show as a bank robber, and as a conventioneer double booked in a hotel room.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest James Coco appears in movie spoof, "One Way Ticket," while Carol gets into an argument with margarine.
Video.title: James Coco

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Peggy Lee are tonight's guests! Featuring an improv comedy performance.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Peggy Lee

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join for a blockbuster tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Madeline Kahn stars in the latest sketch with "The Family" as the pretentious director and star of a play.
Video.title: Madeline Kahn

Video.summary: John Byner & Francine Beers star! Includes a convict seeking refuge, Carol & Vicki as robots, & "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals." "Carol & Sis" finds Carol stuck in a helmet.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest. Sketches include Carol as a princess and a look at the Safety Committee.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: David Frost and Marilyn Horne star. Frost plays a Rolls Royce dealer, while Horne takes the musical spotlight.
Video.title: Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Video.summary: Guests Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, & David Frost join for an operatic, Italian-style Cinderella production.
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
